quarter.theme: Lock Essential **MVP scope**, PRD/AC baseline, migration narrative, and execution readiness.

outcomes.outcome: Full Requirements tree in vault + design sign-off
Federated remote app + payslip path + WhatsApp
outcomes.notes: In launch scope; **formal PRDs/AC immediately after GA checkpoint** (see tasks)

q2Goals.success: MVP live in market **by end of April / early Q2** (align comms + internal “GA” milestone); WhatsApp + payslip-related scope either **in GA** or **explicitly phased** with customer comms
**2–3 clients** through **substantive migration** (onboarded, cutover, or production use as defined per account) — reconcile with Q2 cohort (e.g. Nu, KFC, Kauai) via **steering**
**Payslip / WhatsApp** (and related AC) **written and agreed** where still missing — not an open-ended “later”
Owners, cutover criteria, steering cadence **live** (even if kickoff date flexes slightly vs “end May”)

tldr: **Q1 close-out week:** Top 3 are GA unblock (dependencies/RACI/ICPs/GTM), PRD/AC clarity for WhatsApp + federated payslip, and Q2 migration framing — you’re midweek with **one working day after today** before the weekend.

**Meetings:** None captured in this week’s priority sheet — treat the day as **untyped until you confirm calendar** (connect Apple Calendar + `/calendar-setup` when you can; task [[^task-20260323-004]] is already in motion).
**Focus:** Finish momentum on **launch doc execution** (dependencies + RACI) and advance **spec parity** so build and comms don’t drift before GA.
